response.justification: Candidate is a highly experienced Principal-level software engineer with strong architectural and optimization skills, but lacks essential hardware/semiconductor expertise required for SoC/IP modeling and AI accelerator design. This is a specialized hardware architecture role that cannot be filled by a software-focused engineer, regardless of seniority.
strengths: 15+ years of professional experience with demonstrated Principal/Staff-level expertise in architecture and optimization
Track record of low-level performance optimization including real-time systems, asynchronous I/O, and high-performance databases
Diverse technical breadth across multiple programming languages and domains demonstrating strong problem-solving ability
concerns: No demonstrated experience with SoC, IP modeling, or semiconductor architecture—core requirements for the role
Missing expertise in GPU architecture, hardware acceleration, and AI accelerator design
No evidence of deep learning workload optimization or neural network training/inference knowledge
